examples.title: Connect to HANA Database
examples.description: Establish a connection to a HANA database instance
Connect to HANA on localhost with port and credentials
Connect to remote HANA instance using hostname

examples.title: Import Data from CSV or Excel
examples.description: Import data from CSV or Excel files into database tables
Import CSV with auto column matching

examples.usage: hana-cli import -n data.xlsx -o excel -t SALES -m name
examples.description: Import Excel with name-based column matching
Import and clear table before insert (truncate)
Import with custom batch size for large files

examples.title: Export Data to CSV or Excel
examples.description: Export table or query results to CSV or Excel files
Export table to CSV file

examples.usage: hana-cli export -s SCHEMA -t SALES -o excel -f sales.xlsx
examples.description: Export table to Excel from specific schema

examples.usage: hana-cli export -q "SELECT * FROM PRODUCTS WHERE price > 100" -f expensive.csv
examples.description: Export custom query results to CSV

examples.title: Find Duplicate Records

examples.title: Synchronize Data Between Environments
examples.description: Sync data changes from source to target table

examples.usage: hana-cli dataSync -s SCHEMA1 -t TABLE1 -c SCHEMA2.TABLE2 -k ID
examples.description: Sync tables with ID as key column
Full data synchronization between environments
